calendar.matters:
Mtn For Order Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion for Order Terminating Sanctions and to strike the claim of Joshua M. Sheedar is GRANTED. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
